species: We confirmed RPL22L1b expression in human tissue and standard cancer cell lines.
tissue: Interestingly, maximal expression of this isoform was detected in the brain.
cell_type: we compared the proteome and transcriptome in paired GBM tissue samples (core versus edge) as well as in primary neurosphere cultures established from each tumour zone.
disease_state: Glioblastoma (GBM) is characterized by exceptionally high intratumoral heterogeneity.
sample_source: we demonstrated that in our patient-derived GBM cells RPL22L1b mRNA is associated with polyribosome fraction...
anatomic_site_tumor: RPL22L1b appears under low-pH conditions in the tumour core...
cell_line: cells that according to RT-PCR predominantly express RPL22L1a (A549, DU145, 001, 025 and 157)...
